ports.notes: Anonymous login allowed per nmap (code 230). Empty listing. Known backdoored version CVE-2011-2523.
Protocol 2.0. Very old version. DSA and RSA host keys.
Domain: hackthebox.gr. FQDN: lame.hackthebox.gr. Message signing disabled. SMB2 negotiation failed.

file_sharing.notes: Anonymous login allowed but empty listing — no files accessible.
Null session exposes shares: print$, tmp (comment: 'oh noes!'), opt, IPC$, ADMIN$.

remote_access.notes: Very old version. Useful for stable shell after initial access.

other_services.notes: Distributed compiler daemon. No access restriction. CVE-2004-2687 allows RCE as daemon user.

anomalies.description: SMB 'tmp' share has comment 'oh noes!' — deliberately exposed, likely writable
anomalies.significance: May be relevant to exploitation — writable share could be used for payload staging

oracle_recommendations.action: Exploit Samba 3.0.20 via CVE-2007-2447 (username map script RCE)
oracle_recommendations.rationale: Direct root shell. No auth required. Confirmed vulnerable version. Multiple reliable PoCs. Trivial single-command exploit.
Would give root if backdoor is active, but frequently non-functional on HTB instances.

oracle_recommendations.action: Exploit distccd CVE-2004-2687 for user shell
oracle_recommendations.rationale: Reliable RCE but only as low-priv daemon user. Would require separate privesc. Fallback only.
